sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109867" key="u(fodo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑφοδόω</orth>, <sense id="n109867.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">guide,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0490.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philippid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑφοδώσεις</foreign> cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑφ᾽ ὁδοῦ ὡς εἶναι</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
